rmt_mf_degenerate.finding: Phoneme NN matching collapses to 1 unique match regardless of Megethos inclusion
rmt_mf_degenerate.cause: Z-score normalization makes all domain distributions identical (mean=0, std=1). NN in this normalized space finds the same closest point for all queries.
rmt_mf_degenerate.implication: The phoneme NN methodology CANNOT differentiate within-domain structure. It can only detect between-domain coupling at the coarsest level.
rmt_mf_degenerate.montgomery_odlyzko: The connection is mathematically established (Montgomery 1973, Odlyzko 1989). Our measurement of it via phoneme NN is degenerate, but the connection itself is not in question.

broader_lesson.what_phoneme_NN_can_do: Detect that two domains have nonzero coupling (bond dimension > 0)
broader_lesson.what_it_cannot_do: Measure the PRECISION of that coupling or differentiate within-domain structure
broader_lesson.what_survives: Discovery of correspondences (which invariants align). Prediction accuracy numbers are inflated.
